title: [MTR4] VDL Citea Carris Metropolitana
description: This ResourcePack adds VDL Citea buses with the Carris Metropolitana Livery
body:
This pack adds the VDL Citea LLE-120 bus, a retexture of CinderaceOTS' ADL Enviro200 model. It comes in the Carris Metropolitana Livery (Lisbon, Portugal). (check the screenshots)
![carris metropolitana](https://i.imgur.com/v8KG14J.png)
If you are looking for the base model, the Enviro200, it's not on this website. Please join the [SMTR Discord Server](https://discord.gg/zM5PydRdtH) instead.
